title: Testing in Vue.js Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of unit/integration/E2E testing, Vue Test Utils (VTU), and modern Vitest framework.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily purpose of a Unit Test in a Vue app?
options: To test individual functions or components in isolated units to ensure each works as expected.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the official component testing library for Vue.js?
Which method in Vue Test Utils is used to mount a component in isolation along with its child components?
Which modern, blazing-fast testing framework is commonly used with Vite in Vue 3 projects?
Does Vue Test Utils allow you to simulate user events like clicking a button?
